creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text:
Hi Mark,

My Makefile has this (if I am not mistaken):

LICENSE=   GPLv2+
LICENSE_FILE=  ${WRKSRC}/LICENSE

Is that not enough ? The actual file LICENSE is hosted at the GitHub repo.
Please let me know if you need me to make any changes.

I could not understand what you mean by 'Fix Synopsis'. Kindly elaborate.


Thanks.
Manish Jain
